title: Output Path
description: Base path for generated Dart files relative to package root.

title: Package Name
description: Dart package name for import paths.

title: Generate Token Files
description: Generate individual Dart token constant files (colors, spacing, typography, etc.).

title: Generate ThemeData
description: Generate complete Flutter ThemeData builder function with Material 3 component themes.

title: Generate ThemeExtension
description: Generate EdnetTokens ThemeExtension with lerp support.

title: Generate EDNet DSL v2 YAML
description: Generate domain model YAML from component structure with ednet:* custom properties.

title: Class Prefix
description: Prefix for generated Dart class names (e.g. Ednet, Morfik).

title: Include Doc Comments
description: Add /// doc comments to generated Dart constants.
